name: MCP Filesystem
description: Reads real files from a local directory through a real Model Context Protocol (MCP) server (@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem, stdio transport). No mock data.

path.description: Absolute path to the file to read

implementation_notes: Real MCP server, launched via 'npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem <MCP_FILESYSTEM_ROOT>'. Restricted to the directory set by MCP_FILESYSTEM_ROOT. Calls the server's read_text_file (or read_file) tool. See agents/runner/agent_runner.py.
